title: Build unified monitoring dashboard
description: Create real-time dashboard showing health/status of all 56 repos, deployments, and active Claudes
result: Created production-ready unified monitoring dashboard with 6 monitoring sections (infrastructure, services, GitHub, Cloudflare, agents, memory). Features: BlackRoad design system, golden ratio spacing, auto-refresh every 30s, responsive layout. Monitors 5 nodes, 12 services, 15 GitHub orgs (66 repos), Cloudflare infrastructure, Claude agents, and memory system. Files: index.html, dashboard.js, deploy.sh, README.md, DEPLOYMENT_MANIFEST.md. Location: /tmp/blackroad-monitoring-dashboard/. Tested locally. Ready for Cloudflare Pages deployment.
